bank.reflect_mission: Maintain durable infrastructure memory for the home-network environment: host roles, deployment model, source-of-truth conventions, service placement, backup and restore expectations, and recurring operational constraints.
bank.retain_mission: Keep stable infrastructure facts such as host identities, source-vs-runtime deployment rules, service ownership, ports, backup/restore paths, and durable operational guardrails. Ignore temporary incidents, short-lived failures, and routine run noise unless they establish a lasting constraint.
bank.observations_mission: Synthesize durable infrastructure patterns: host responsibilities, deployment flow, backup/restore design, service dependencies, and stable networking or storage constraints.

directives.name: source-of-truth-first
directives.content: Prefer source-of-truth facts from the home-network repository and only treat runtime paths as deployed state. Preserve rebuild and restore clarity between source config and host-local state.

directives.name: restorability-over-noise
directives.content: Prioritize facts that affect rebuildability, restorability, service placement, secrets handling, ports, persistent data locations, and operator guardrails.

mental_models.name: Home-network topology and deployment model
mental_models.source_query: Summarize the durable host topology, deployment flow, source-of-truth repository conventions, runtime locations, and backup/restore boundaries for the home-network environment.

mental_models.name: Home-network service operations
mental_models.source_query: Summarize stable operational facts about service placement, ports, monitoring, homepage exposure, secrets handling, and restore-critical data paths in the home-network environment.
